criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings across app stores and review platforms.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Capterra, G2

criteria.name: Number of Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads or active users.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, company reports

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and usefulness of features offered by the app.

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Extent and effectiveness of AI features within the app.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: Ease of use and overall user interface design.
